message:
test(e2e): add parity contract overlay validation for evidence schema (DROPIN-171)

Add test coverage for the new parity_contract overlay in the evidence
contract schema:

- evidence_contract_schema_defines_parity_contract_overlay: Validates
  that the schema definitions include a parity_contract object with
  the correct const values for schema version (v1), log_record_schema
  (pi.test.log.v2), artifact_record_schema (pi.test.artifact.v1), and
  failure_digest_schema (pi.e2e.failure_digest.v1)

- Extend synthetic_evidence_contract_validates_against_schema with a
  complete parity_contract block including trace_model (correlation_id,
  trace_id, span_id, parent_span_id fields) and triage_required_fields,
  plus assertions verifying the synthetic contract overlay round-trips
  correctly through schema validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
